final_bulk_interpretation: Bulk module signals are disease-context consistency evidence embedded within tissue-state programs; they are not independent validation.
allowed_claim: Bulk module shifts are embedded in plaque/stone-associated injury/remodeling tissue-state programs.
not_allowed_claim: Bulk validates causal genes; injury adjustment proves confounding; retained adjusted effect proves independent mechanism; deconvolution proves cell fractions.
